assessor_1_raw: Variable sequence length due to transaction frequency is handled correctly by padding/truncation. GBT multi-window statistics similarly capture frequency-dependent patterns. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Device fingerprint is included in sequence features at transaction time - appropriate temporal feature. No post-transaction information. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Fraud rate tracking across train/val/test splits provides distribution shift monitoring. This is a reporting tool, not a control. The comparison remains valid within each split. Verdict: defense_wins.
